productDisplayName: Puma Men Pack of 3 Sports Socks
description: Set of three socks in black, white and navy blue It's comfort unparalleled once you slip into these socks from puma. Made of soft cotton knit fabric, these socks can be worn both for sporting events and casual days. Made of cotton knit fabric for all-day comfort, easy stretch and sweat-free wear Padded footbed for cushioned comfort Seamless stitch for abrasion-free wear Rib knit mouth with puma Leaping cat logo and slogan below it Roomy toe area for superior comfort and durability sock care Machine wash cold in 40 degree using mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not iron, dry clean or tumble dry Dry in shade
